findings.summary: zone_count statistic inflated 480x by teardrop zones
findings.details: The PCB statistics report zone_count=481, but 480 of these are KiCad-generated teardrop pad/via fills. Only 1 real copper fill zone exists.

findings.summary: pwr_flag_warnings false-positive: PWR_FLAG symbols are properly wired to +5V and GND
findings.details: The analyzer raises pwr_flag_warnings for both +5V and GND, saying they have no power_out or PWR_FLAG. In fact, two PWR_FLAG symbols are present and properly wired.

findings.summary: key matrix overcounts switches_on_matrix (63) vs diodes_on_matrix (60) due to 2u alternate keys
findings.details: The analyzer reports switches_on_matrix=63 but diodes_on_matrix=60. The 2 extra counted switches are optional 2u keycap alternate footprints, not additional matrix entries.

findings.summary: Gerber alignment reported as failed due to B.SilkS extending 55mm beyond board edge
findings.details: The alignment check reports aligned=false. The real discrepancy is B.SilkS extending beyond the board outline, which is legitimate. Silkscreen layers should be excluded from alignment checks.
